sessions.ai_summary:

(2) Interestingly, none of these numerical columns show strong correlations with each other, and the 'income' column is skewed. 
(3) Next, it would be useful to explore why the 'income' column is skewed and if there are any underlying patterns or outliers causing this skewness. Also, despite the lack of strong correlations, further analysis can be done to find potential hidden relationships between the variables.
